positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial whale soaring through a vibrant, deep indigo nebula. The whale has a sleek, stylized silhouette with bioluminescent accents glowing cyan and turquoise. The background features swirling cosmic dust clouds in deep purples and magentas, contrasting sharply with the luminous cyan accents. Composition should be centered, occupying the entire frame for maximum impact on apparel. Clean vector style, highly contrasted, symmetrical composition, high detail, print-ready, designed for silkscreen printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low detail, noisy, text, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grainy, realistic photo, complex shadows, messy, bokeh
